top_signals.title: Stocks Fall Ahead of CPI as US-Iran Truce Frays: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Technology stocks were set to lead US equities lower for a second day as traders prepared for a hot inflation report and an escalation in the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices jump after Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' for failing at peace deal
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The inflation scenario that could send bitcoin tumbling below $60,000
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin Selloff Leaves Half of All Supply Trading at a Loss
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s latest retreat has been so severe, it has pushed more than half its circulating supply into loss-making territory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China Oil Imports Collapse; Down 29%

top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Don’t Give Up on Global Order

top_signals.title: Microsoft Defender 'RoguePlanet' zero-day grants SYSTEM privileges
top_signals.summary: A security researcher has released a new Microsoft Defender zero-day exploit named "RoguePlanet" just hours after Microsoft fixed two previously disclosed flaws during June 2026 Patch Tuesday. [...]
